description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a flat, light-colored roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The exterior walls are painted in a warm beige or peach tone, with white trim around the windows and doors. The front facade features a main entrance door and several windows, while the rear and side elevations have fewer openings and a more utilitarian appearance. There is a small landscaped area with greenery visible within the boundary, suggesting a modest garden or courtyard. The roof appears to have a section with a different surface material, possibly for a terrace or utility area. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, beige exterior walls, white trim, and a small enclosed garden area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and a small landscaped area behind a low wall.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the elongated shape, boundary wall, and partial view of the garden and windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal openings, a large solid wall, and a section of the roof with a different surface material.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the secondary entrance, window arrangement, and the enclosed garden area.
